author: machdragon
name: Non-record: staging profile + LAWA + slide eval (8xH100)
blurb: Non-record submission. Reproducible validation of the `STAGING_PROFILE=1` merged-staging recipe on 8xH100 with LAWA enabled and sliding-window evaluation. Does not beat current leaderboard SOTA (example: Muon WD + 10 layer at val_bpb=1.1748). Score is the `final_int8_zlib_roundtrip_exact` metric under the 16,000,000-byte cap.
